docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Answer
docs.text:
HashMap is a non-thread-safe key-value structure.

ConcurrentHashMap is thread-safe and uses fine-grained synchronization and CAS operations.

Hashtable is a legacy synchronized implementation.

docs.title: What is CAS?
docs.text: Compare-And-Set is an atomic CPU operation used for lock-free concurrency.
